channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-7665] sanity test_300p: create striped directory should fail
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for John Hammond <john.hammond@intel.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sets/14d853f8-ba7a-11e5-9137-5254006e85c2.

The sub-test test_300p failed with the following error:

create striped directory should fail

The MDS console logs show that the fail_loc was hit:

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 300p: create striped directory without space == 22:41:25 (1452724885)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: lctl set_param fail_loc=0x80001704
Lustre: *** cfs_fail_loc=1704, val=0***
LustreError: 6436:0:(out_handler.c:854:out_tx_end()) lustre-MDT0003-osd: undo for lustre/target/out_handler.c:594: rc = -524

Info required for matching: sanity 300p
item.summary: sanity test_300p: create striped directory should fail

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56941/
Subject: LU-7665 test: improve sanity 300p
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set:
Commit: 0242a01fa2dfd93038bdcfeddaacffcf408d229c

"Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56941
Subject: LU-7665 test: improve sanity 300p
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: b2_15
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: e3df0f3836b87c74e371acfb97213eac5b208242

"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54625/
Subject: LU-7665 test: improve sanity 300p
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ac04484c1beec9f46d1256e8ea236f24073344af

"Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/54625
Subject: LU-7665 test: improve sanity 300p
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: 2ba9dec25725943f4f3986479a0b3617689cc7bc
It turns out that llog operations failed on this, but it's not critical, so the create succeeds. I'll see how to make it fail on create path.

This failed 10x in the past week, and has been failing frequently since 2024-02-15.

The test is running:

        mkdir_on_mdt0 $DIR/$tdir

        #define OBD_FAIL_OUT_ENOSPC     0x1704
        do_facet mds2 lctl set_param fail_loc=0x80001704
        $LFS setdirstripe -i 0 -c2 $DIR/$tdir/bad_striped_dir

I suspect the issue might be that the MDT QOS allocation is selecting the second MDT stripe on MDT0002 (on mds1 where fail_loc is not set), when it used to always allocate "MDT0000,MDT0001 when "-i 0 -c 2" was used?

I think the test should be considered a success if the MDTs on mds2 are avoided (MDT0001, MDT0003), or possibly changed so that it explicitly tries to create a stripe on MDT0001? Alternately, change fail_loc=0x1704 so that it checks fail_val==mdt_idx and reports ENOSPC for all but that one MDT and set it on both MDS nodes?

Another option would be to not create a striped directory in this case, and just create an unstriped directory instead of failing? I think most users would prefer that their application keeps running with one MDT rather than getting an error when there is still space available on one MDT.
+1 on master branch, at https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2057c14e-3e45-4814-b873-cbcb256999c3

+1 on Master (https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/b0caa73a-d5c9-4f17-9806-76c5dde916e0)

Machine : Red Hat Enterprise Linux 8.8 (Ootpa), Kernel 4.18.0-477.27.1.el8_lustre.x86_64 on an x86_64

FSTYPE=ldsifs (MDS/OST)

I could not find any LustreError. So, this failure is not similar to one which this LU was open. I am still taging this failure with this LU as the failure is rare. If it starts failure more often then new LU will be required.

CLIENT

== sanity test 300p: create striped directory without space ========================================================== 01:06:18 (1708045578)
CMD: trevis-74vm12 lctl set_param fail_loc=0x80001704
fail_loc=0x80001704
 sanity test_300p: @@@@@@ FAIL: create striped directory should fail@ 
  Trace dump: 
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:6962:error()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:26271:test_300p()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7302:run_one()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7362:run_one_logged()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/test-framework.sh:7188:run_test()
  = /usr/lib64/lustre/tests/sanity.sh:26278:main()
Dumping lctl log to /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-15/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_102197_31_f75ed8aa-db30-4e5b-8452-4b13f29bd8ca//sanity.test_300p.*.1708045580.log
CMD: trevis-74vm10,trevis-74vm12,trevis-74vm4.trevis.whamcloud.com,trevis-74vm5,trevis-74vm6 /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-15/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_102197_31_f75ed8aa-db30-4e5b-8452-4b13f29bd8ca//sanity.test_300p.debug_log.\$(hostname -s).1708045580.log;
>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>dmesg > /autotest/autotest-2/2024-02-15/lustre-reviews_review-ldiskfs-dne_102197_31_f75ed8aa-db30-4e5b-8452-4b13f29bd8ca//sanity.test_300p.dmesg.\$(hostname -s).1708045580.log
FAIL 300p (5s)

 

MDS (nothing alarming here)

 

[18903.831133] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity test 300p: create striped directory without space ========================================================== 01:06:18 \(1708045578\)^M
[18904.020180] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 300p: create striped directory without space ========================================================== 01:06:18 (1708045578)^M
[18904.619940] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  sanity test_300p: @@@@@@ FAIL: create striped directory should fail ^M
[18904.810801] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: sanity test_300p: @@@@@@ FAIL: create striped directory should fail^M
 

 

OST (nothing alarming here)

18903.869250] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark == sanity test 300p: create striped directory without space ========================================================== 01:06:18 \(1708045578\)^M
[18904.049592] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 300p: create striped directory without space ========================================================== 01:06:18 (1708045578)^M
[18904.657328] Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  sanity test_300p: @@@@@@ FAIL: create striped directory should fail ^M
This is still failing very occasionally on master, about once per week.

+1 on master branch:
https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/2cd30a17-97f9-413e-9653-dc557ef34ff9
